Info

TypedDict for SplashRegistry parameters.

class ats_utilities.splasher.splash_params.SplashParams[source]¶

Bases: TypedDict

TypedDict defining parameter types for SplashRegistry.

context_bundle: ContextBundle¶
ext: IExtInfrastructure¶
pb: IProgressBar¶
prop: Mapping[str, Any]¶
property_validated: bool¶
splash_property: ISplashProperty¶
terminal_property: ITerminalProperties¶
